title: EgDen's Furniture
body:
This is my (Eg) and my friend's (Den) mod. It adds different decorative blocks like computers, cameras, server shelves and others.

 | All blocks don't have crafts or functionality |
 |        But that will change in the future            |

You can use this mod however you want, but if you use it to make modpacks or addons or anything else, please give a credit

Made with MCreator
